title: Inside The University of Tennessee’s $200 Million Facility
body: I didn’t know Chris Lofton had anything named after at Tennessee.  That’s cool.  I met him and got his autograph back when he was actually playing for Tennessee. Just random af, my cousin and I just happened to run into him on the street one night.  Somewhere on or near the campus, though I can’t remember where it was now. Nothing going on, no one else around, just walking alone on a sidewalk as we happened to drive by and recognize him. Like I said, random af.  I’d actually forgotten that until seeing his name in this video.
author: @jsmith3798

author: @Urfavcatcake7

title: COME TOUR UTK WITH ME *college tour vlog*
body:
Hi Noelle! I just wanted to tell you how much I love your videos. I watch them every single day and they are so perfect and motivating. Whenever I am not feeling up to doing things, I watch one of your videos and it really helps me get started.

I also wanted to be honest and say that lately I have been a bit lazy about opening my Bible, and I am not quite sure why. I have a question for you: could you please do a video about your Bible? It always looks so pretty, aesthetic, and colorful. I would love to see how you do your Bible study and how you make your notes look so beautiful.

I know you probably might not see this, but if you do, please consider making a long video about it. If you can’t or don't want to, I completely understand. Thank you so much for taking the time to read my comment, and I wish you nothing but the best. ❤
author: @strwb_aria

title: University of Tennessee Campus Tour
body:
Born and raised in Auburn and attended highschool and college at AU. Even worked in the VPs office for a few years.
War Eagle! My Daughter received her Masters degree at AU and now works at UT. UT is much older than AU and I personally like UT MUCH, MUCH better than Auburn. Auburn was GREAT in the 70's and 80's, not at all so great anymore! Anyway, thanks for the video and hope your Daughter is enjoying her time at UT....GO VOLS 🧡
author: @NotYaMomma70sStyle

title: MORNING IN MY LIFE AT THE UNIVERSITY OF ALABAMA | friday morning vlog
body: yall need to watch her actual videos before you comment ignorant things. her bmw is a hand me down, this room is in a college sorority house, and she works hard to buy HERSELF the things she wants. all of this i learned from like 2 videos.
author: @paigenootbaar44

title: MORNING IN MY LIFE AT THE UNIVERSITY OF ALABAMA | friday morning vlog
body: For everyone saying she is a kid of a rich family. She runs all of her social media platforms alone which make you gain a lot of money. Her BMW is a hand me down from her mom from 2010. Most of her skincare is PR. She does really nice videos about all of the unboxing and that is where most of her skincare and make up is from. In her Amazon storefront you can see some of the things that she used to decorate her room and they do not cost an insane amount of money. I think we should be happy for her and also appreciate the things that we have in life, without looking so much into others people life and choosing either to say if the person grew up rich or poor.
author: @rjfxf

title: The night my life changed.
body: This angle is much better than the one that went viral, it really shows how accurate and clean your movements were and how well you matched with the team (in sync, similar sharpness, and control, etc). Very well done!
author: @paulking5199

title: The night my life changed.
body: Bro, I had a stroke a few years ago.  I was so down and defeated, but when I saw this video...I remembered how much I loved gymnastics, and dance, and performance in general.  You made me start caring again so that one day maybe I could do something this cool in front of all those people again.
author: @SteveHarper-n8r

title: The night my life changed.
body: This never gets old.  As an almost 40 year old female who was a NCA All American Cheerleader in high school, I have to say I am SOO jealous.  Plus, you brought it!  Great, clean moves and completely in sync with the girls.  👏👏👏
